name: HRR_TMPL_ANALYTIC_TYPES_B
description: Talent Review Analytic Types table. This table is used to store different analytic types used in a graph (example, BOX_CHART)

columns.Name: ANALYTIC_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of HRR_TMPL_ANALYTIC_TYPES_B

columns.Name: ANALYTIC_VIEW_MODE
columns.Comments: Defines if box view is XY mode or Single Measure mode

columns.Name: METRIC_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the metric to be used for Single measure view

columns.Name: DEFAULT_VIEW_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to specify if the current view is the default view

columns.Name: SUBMIT_BOX_ASGNMNT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to check if the box labels need to be pushed to Profiles

columns.Name: VIEW_ROW_COUNT
columns.Comments: Specifies the number of rows for the single measure mode

columns.Name: VIEW_COLUMN_COUNT
columns.Comments: Specifies the number of columns for the single measure mode

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: DASHBOARD_TMPL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key of HRR_DASHBOARD_TMPLS_B

columns.Name: ANALYTIC_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of analytic graph.

columns.Name: HORIZONTAL_AXIS_CODE
columns.Comments: Horizontal axis value.

columns.Name: VERTICAL_AXIS_CODE
columns.Comments: Vertical axis value.

columns.Name: HORZ_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Horizontal Rating Model Id

columns.Name: VERT_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Vertical Rating Model Id

columns.Name: SCORE_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Rating model for calibrating talent score.

columns.Name: RISK_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Risk of Loss rating Model Id

columns.Name: IMPACT_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Impact of Loss rating Model Id

columns.Name: COLOR_SCHEME_CODE
columns.Comments: Chart Box Color Scheme

columns.Name: DEFAULT_VIEW_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the default view type in dashboard template

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.
